prompt_used: Surface Case Library (/library) objective: Browse and select stories with premium visual hierarchy.. Produce a loop-ready motion teaser with subtle camera drift, practical light flicker, and safe pacing for homepage or section transitions.

voiceover.speaker: Case Handler
voiceover.script: Case Handler briefing. This surface preview is not a trailer cut, it is an operations snapshot of how the case unfolds for players in real time. You begin with the primary evidence drop, then move through escalating transmissions, evidence drops, and live branch decisions that alter suspect trust and outcome risk. The primary setting is the scene, but the core mystery is whether the threat is creating the story or merely exploiting it. Player success means deliver findings that a first-time investigator can understand and verify.
